events.label: assistant
events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`. Bottom line: an expired confined-space permit is a mandatory stop-work event under 1910.146(d)(4) — entrants must exit immediately, atmosphere must be re-tested, and a new/renewed permit issued and re-briefed before any re-entry. I marked it `fail`/`critical` risk since work reportedly continued past the expiration.
